use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers and sidebars
Show author or participant avatars in project and team interfaces
Represent users in comment sections, activity feeds, and notification lists
Display team member or employee images in organizational dashboards
ai_summary: A reusable avatar component built with Radix UI primitives that displays user profile images with automatic fallback to initials when images fail to load. Features a clean, minimalist design with rounded-full styling and standard 40px sizing, making it suitable for professional SaaS, fintech, and general-purpose applications requiring user representation.
